creator: tijl@FreeBSD.org
text:
On Wed, 7 May 2014 23:22:19 +0300 Christos Chatzaras wrote:
> After this patch when I do:
> 
> cd /usr/ports/www/lighttpd
> make config
> 
> I get this message:
> 
> "/usr/ports/Mk/bsd.gnome.mk", line 662: The Pre include part of bsd.gnome.mk part is not included. Did you forget WANT_GNOME=yes before bsd.port.pre.mk?
> 
> Also its not possible to upgrade lighttpd.

Thanks for the report.  It should be fixed with r353212.
